WIZARD.TITLE: {{entity}} Wizard
WIZARD.COMPLETION_TEXT: You've completed all of the information required and we're ready to create your {{entity}}.

SHARED.LOOKUP_FAILED: We were unable to load the values for this field.

TEXT.MIN: {{field}} must be at least {{min}} characters long.

NUMBER.MIN: {{field}} must be greater than or equal to {{min}}
NUMBER.MAX: {{field}} must be less than or equal to {{max}}.

MIN_MAX.MIN_LARGER_THAN_MAX: Min value cannot exceed max value.

CHECKLIST.DESCRIPTION: Additional results have been truncated from this list. Please narrow down your search criteria.

ASSET_FILTER.DESCRIPTION: Enter either an asset / vehicle name or the name of an asset group.
ASSET_FILTER.TRUNCATED_MESSAGE: Showing {{limit}} of {{count}} items. Use the search to refine your results.

SEARCH_SELECT.TRUNCATED_MESSAGE: Showing {{limit}} of {{count}} items. Use the search to refine your results.

CLIENT_FILTER.DESCRIPTION_MULTIPLE: Enter a client name, or type "any" to select all clients.

VENDOR_FILTER.DESCRIPTION_MULTIPLE: Enter a vendor name, or type "any" to select all vendors.

DISTRIBUTOR_FILTER.DESCRIPTION_MULTIPLE: Enter a distributor name, or type "any" to select all distributors.

ZONE_FILTER.DESCRIPTION: Enter either a geofence name or the name of a geofence group.

UNAUTHORIZED.NO_PERMISSION_MESSAGE: You don't have permission to access this resource.

IMAGE_EDITOR.DRAG_DROP_HELP: Drag and drop an image from your computer, or paste an image from your clipboard.

RESET.CONFIRM: This will suspend the user and send an email to them with instructions on how to recover their account.
RESET.ERROR: An error was encountered while resetting the account.
RESET.ERROR_EMAIL: The user password was successfully reset, but we were unable to send the account recovery email. You should try resetting the account again.

INVITE.ERROR_EMAIL: The user was successfully created, but we were unable to send the account creation invitation email. You should reset the account in order to try again.

DETAILS.TITLE: User Details
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Complete the following personal details for the user.
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION_ALT: Complete the following personal details for yourself.

FIELDS.NAME: Name
FIELDS.PASSWORD_ALPHANUMERIC: Must contain both letters and numbers
FIELDS.PASSWORD_MIXED_CASE: Must contain both lowercase and uppercase letters
FIELDS.PASSWORD_SYMBOLS: Must contain one or more non-alphanumeric symbols
FIELDS.SEND_INVITE_DESCRIPTION: If enabled, the user will receive an email inviting them to activate their account.

ROLES.TITLE: User Roles
ROLES.DESCRIPTION: Select from the following user roles.

CLIENT_PERMISSIONS.DESCRIPTION: You can restrict this user to only particular clients and assets by specifying them in the list below.

CLIENT.DESCRIPTION: Specify permissions for a specific client here.

ASSET_PERMISSIONS.TITLE: Asset Permissions
ASSET_PERMISSIONS.DESCRIPTION: You can restrict this user to only particular assets by specifying them in the list below.

MESSAGES.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to force log out the selected session?

OIDC_TAGS.TITLE: External Authentication
OIDC_TAGS.DESCRIPTION: Link the user with one or more external OpenID Connect providers by entering the subscriber ID unique to each provider.

ERRORS.LINK_EMAIL: The email address retrieved from {{issuer}} does not match the email address of this user.
ERRORS.LINK_FIELDS: We were unable to retrieve the email & subscriber ID from {{issuer}}.

CLEAR.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to clear your cached OTP tokens on this computer?. You will need to perform multi-factor authentication again when you log in.

DELETE.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to clear this OTP enrollment? The user will have to re-enroll in OTP on next login.

ADD_OTP.TITLE: OTP Enrollment
ADD_OTP.DESCRIPTION: Scan the following QR Code in your authenticator app on your mobile phone, and then enter the code that it gives you.

NEW.DESCRIPTION: Enter a descriptive name for your new API key.

DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Your API key is displayed below. This will only be shown to you once and cannot be recovered. Make sure to copy and safely store the value before dismissing this message.

DELETE.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? Anyone using this key will immediately lose access.

DETAILS.TITLE: Asset Details

PRIVACY_MODE.AD_HOC_PRIVACY_MODE: This asset is currently in ad-hoc privacy mode, ends at
PRIVACY_MODE.REMOVE_PRIVACY_MODE: Are you sure you want to remove privacy mode from this asset?

MODAL.DESCRIPTION: You are about to enable privacy mode, specify the conditions for automatically ending privacy mode, if any.

AVATAR.PERMISSION_DENIED_DELETE: You do not have permission to delete this avatar.
AVATAR.PERMISSION_DENIED_UPLOAD: You do not have permission to upload an avatar.
AVATAR.DELETE_SUCCESS: The Asset Avatar was successfully deleted.
AVATAR.DELETE_ERROR: An error occurred while trying to delete the asset avatar: {{error}}
AVATAR.UPLOAD_FAILED: An error occurred while trying to upload the image: {{error}}

CONTACTS.TITLE: Contacts
CONTACTS.DESCRIPTION: The following contacts will be associated with this asset.

MODAL.DESCRIPTION: Complete the following information for your asset contact.

CONTACTS.EMPTY_PICKER: No contacts added yet. Search above to add one.
CONTACTS.EMPTY_VIEW: No contacts added to this asset.

EVENT_TRIGGERS.TITLE: Event Triggers
EVENT_TRIGGERS.DESCRIPTION: Define when speed, idle and trip limit events will be generated for this asset.

ANALOG_TRIGGERS.TITLE: Analog Triggers
ANALOG_TRIGGERS.DESCRIPTION: Define when analog and temperature events will be generated for this asset.

FIELDS.ANALOG_DESCRIPTION: Range of {{minRange}} to {{maxRange}} with a debounce of {{rangeDebounce}} positions.
FIELDS.TEMPERATURE_DESCRIPTION: Range of {{minRange}} to {{maxRange}} with a debounce of {{rangeDebounce}} positions.

ANALOG.TITLE: Analog Event Trigger
ANALOG.DESCRIPTION: An event will be generated when the specified range is violated, or a sudden drop or increase is detected matching the specified amounts.

TEMPERATURE.TITLE: Temperature Event Trigger
TEMPERATURE.DESCRIPTION: An event will be generated when the specified range is violated.

CURFEW_EVENTS.TITLE: Working Hours
CURFEW_EVENTS.DESCRIPTION: Define the working hours of this asset in order to generate curfew violation events.

CURFEW.TITLE: Working Hours
CURFEW.DESCRIPTION: An event will be generated when the asset moves outside of the specified working hours.

ODO.TITLE: Odometer Reminder
ODO.DESCRIPTION: Odometer reminders will create an event (and optional alert) when the specified odometer value is reached.

FIELDS.STARTING_AT_DESCRIPTION: Set the odometer value to start reminders from

HOURS.TITLE: Engine Hours Reminder
HOURS.DESCRIPTION: Engine Hour reminders will create an event (and optional alert) when the specified engine hours value is reached.

FIELDS.STARTING_AT_DESCRIPTION: Set the hours to start reminders from

TIME.TITLE: Time Based Reminder
TIME.DESCRIPTION: Time based reminders will create an event (and optional alert) when the specified date and time is reached.

MESSAGES.DELETED_DETAIL: Reminder "{{name}}" has been marked for deletion.

LABELS.TITLE: Default Labels
LABELS.DESCRIPTION: Configure labels that will be applied to data from this asset by default.

FIELDS.DEFAULT_TRIP_LABELS_DESCRIPTION: The labels specified above will be applied to new trips by default.

ZONES.TITLE: Geographic Triggers
ZONES.DESCRIPTION: Trigger geographic events based on geofence, route and border changes.

FIELDS.BORDERS_DESCRIPTION: When the asset crosses any of these borders an event will be generated.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: Categories
CATEGORIES.DESCRIPTION: Assets can belong to a number of user defined categories.

SHARING.TITLE: Sharing
SHARING.DESCRIPTION: Add companies you'd like to share this asset with below.

MODAL.DESCRIPTION: Enter the PIN number for the company you would like to share this asset with. If you do not know the PIN code, contact the company in question and ask for their PIN.

MOVE.MOVE_ASSET_DESCRIPTION: Select the destination client into which you'd like to move this asset. The asset will be copied to the new client and then deleted in this client.

DETAILS.TITLE: SIM Card Details

SERVICE_STATUS.HEALTHY: Operating normally with no significant errors or latency.
SERVICE_STATUS.WARNING: Experiencing some errors or elevated latency, but still functional.
SERVICE_STATUS.CRITICAL: Experiencing severe issues, high failure rates, or downtime.
SERVICE_STATUS.UNKNOWN: No activity recorded in the selected time range.

TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_SERVICES: The total number of unique services currently monitored by the system.
TOOLTIPS.HEALTHY_SERVICES: The number of services currently reporting a healthy status without errors or latency warnings.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_ERROR_RATE: The average percentage of failed operations across all integrated services.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_RESPONSE_TIME: The average latency across all tracked successful operations in the system.

COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.TYPE: Category of the service (e.g., Compute, Storage, Database)
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.STATUS: Current health condition determined by failure rates and latency
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.UPTIME: Percentage of operations that completed successfully
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.ERROR_RATE: Percentage of operations that resulted in errors or faults
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.OPERATIONS: Total volume of operations recorded within the time range
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.AVG_RESPONSE: Average time taken by the service to process operations
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.P95: The 95th percentile latency - 95% of requests completed faster than this time

TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_FUNCTIONS: The number of unique Azure functions deployed and detected within the time range.
TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_EXECUTIONS: The total aggregated number of executions for all Azure functions combined.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_SUCCESS_RATE: The average percentage of non-failing executions across all functions.
TOOLTIPS.COLD_STARTS: The number of executions that suffered from a cold start delay (the function had to spin up in Azure before executing).

COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.FUNCTION_NAME: Name of the running Azure Function
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.STATUS: Health state based on error rates
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.AVG_DURATION: Average time the function takes to complete
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.LAST_EXECUTION: Timestamp of the most recently recorded execution

COLD_START.TOP_FUNCTIONS: Top Functions by Cold Start Rate

TOOLTIPS.CONNECTED_DEVICES: The number of IoT devices currently connected and sending heartbeat signals.
TOOLTIPS.EVENTHUB_INCOMING: The total number of messages received by the Event Hub from connected devices.
TOOLTIPS.EVENTHUB_OUTGOING: The total number of messages successfully processed and routed out of the Event Hub.
TOOLTIPS.PENDING_MESSAGES: The number of messages currently sitting in the queue waiting to be processed. High numbers indicate processing delays.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_WORKER_DURATION: The average time the queue worker took to process a message (from Azure Monitor).
TOOLTIPS.MAX_WORKER_DURATION: The longest time the queue worker took to process a single message (from Azure Monitor).
TOOLTIPS.DEVICES_BACKLOG: The number of devices having a severe backlog (more than 1000 pending messages).

TIMELINE.NO_DATA_SUBTITLE: Metrics will appear here once telemetry is available.

COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.WORKER_AVG: Average time the queue worker took to process a message (Azure Monitor)
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.WORKER_MAX: Maximum time the queue worker took to process a single message (Azure Monitor)
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.QUEUE_LAG_AVG: Average time messages waited in the queue before being picked up (ADX)
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.QUEUE_LAG_MAX: Maximum time any single message waited in the queue before being picked up (ADX)

TOOLTIPS.AVG_REQUESTS_PER_SEC: The average number of incoming HTTP requests processed by the system per second.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_EVENTS_PER_SEC: The average number of custom events or messages processed per second internally.
TOOLTIPS.AVG_DEPENDENCIES_PER_SEC: The average number of calls made to external systems (databases, APIs, storage) per second.
TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_OPERATIONS: The combined total of all requests, events, and dependencies over the selected time range.

CHART.NO_DATA_SUBTITLE: Throughput metrics will appear here once data is collected.

TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_OPERATIONS: The total number of storage operations (read, write, delete) across all connected storage services.
TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_SUCCESS_RATE: The percentage of storage operations that completed successfully without errors.

COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.STORAGE_TYPE: Type of storage resource (e.g., Azure Blob, Cosmos DB)
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.TARGET: The specific resource instance or table name
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.STATUS: Current health condition of the storage resource
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.OPERATIONS: Total number of operations on this specific resource
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.SUCCESS_RATE: Percentage of successful operations for this resource
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.AVG_LATENCY: Average time taken to complete an operation
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.THROUGHPUT: Average number of operations completed per second
COLUMN_TOOLTIPS.LAST_ACTIVITY: Timestamp of the most recent recorded operation

TOOLTIPS.TOTAL_ALERTS: The total number of alerts recorded in the system.
TOOLTIPS.CRITICAL: Critical alerts that represent severe system failures or data loss. Requires immediate attention.
TOOLTIPS.ERRORS: Standard error alerts indicating operations that failed but may not cause complete system outages.
TOOLTIPS.WARNINGS: Warning alerts indicating potential issues like high latency or throttled queries before they become hard errors.

CHART.NO_DATA_SUBTITLE: Error timeline data will appear here when available

ALERT_STATUS.ACTIVE: The issue is currently ongoing and active.
ALERT_STATUS.RECENT: The issue occurred recently but may not be active right now.
ALERT_STATUS.RESOLVED: The issue has been resolved and is no longer active.

DETAILS.TITLE: Map Set Details
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Configure map layers, projections, zoom thresholds, and servers below.

DESCRIPTION.LAYER: Configure various details about your layer.
DESCRIPTION.OVERLAY: Configure various details about your overlay.

VALIDATION.SERVERS_REQUIRED: At least one server URL is required

DETAILS.TITLE: Export Task Details
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Name your export task and select the target client.

CREDENTIALS.TITLE: Credentials
CREDENTIALS.NONE_FOR_TASK: No credentials available for this export task.
CREDENTIALS.S3_POLICY: You need to apply the following AWS IAM policy to the bucket you've specified in order for the export task to write to the bucket:

FIELDS.BUCKET_ARN_DESCRIPTION: The S3 bucket ARN in the format 'arn:aws:s3:::my-bucket-name'
FIELDS.URL_DESCRIPTION: The destination url in the format 'https://example.com/myapi/'
FIELDS.PARAMS_DESCRIPTION: (Optional) Parameters in the format 'key=value' separated with new lines
FIELDS.ACCESS_KEY_DESCRIPTION: (Optional) A user defined access key that will be passed in the 'x-amz-firehose-access-key' header
FIELDS.BUCKET_ARN_HINT: The ARN of the S3 bucket to deliver data to
FIELDS.ACCESS_KEY_HINT: Optional access key used for authentication

OIDC_ISSUERS.TITLE: External Authentication
OIDC_ISSUERS.DESCRIPTION: To authenticate with an external OpenId Connect issuer, add the issuer below.

FIELDS.NAME: Name
FIELDS.NAME_DESCRIPTION: A descriptive name for this issuer. It will be displayed on a button on the sign in screen.
FIELDS.CLIENT_ID_DESCRIPTION: The Client ID supplied by your Open ID Connect issuer.
FIELDS.CLIENT_SECRET_DESCRIPTION: The client secret is OPTIONAL and is not required for standard web or mobile sign in.

MODAL.TITLE: Issuer Details
MODAL.DESCRIPTION: Complete the following fields obtained from the OpenID Connect issuer.

INFO_SECTION.DESCRIPTION: The following supplemental information is required.

LIMITS.TITLE: Entity Limits
LIMITS.EMPTY: No limits configuration found for this entity.

LOGO.CHANGES_PENDING: Changes pending - will be uploaded on save
LOGO.UPLOAD_ON_SAVE: {{summary}} will be uploaded when you save changes.

BULK_IMPORT.TITLE: Bulk Import Instructions
BULK_IMPORT.DESCRIPTION: Upload a CSV file to bulk import devices, SIM cards, and assets. The file should follow the template format.
BULK_IMPORT.NOTE_BODY: Maximum file size is 10MB. The template is downloaded as an Excel file (.xlsx) with dropdown validations.
BULK_IMPORT.NOTE_FORMAT_WARNING: Please save it as CSV format before uploading!

INFORMATION.TITLE: Information
INFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: The following supplemental information is required.

DETAILS.TITLE: Contact Details
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Configure various details about your contact.

ERRORS.MOBILE_DUPLICATE: Mobile number "{{mobile}}" is already used by "{{name}}".
ERRORS.PHONE_DUPLICATE: Office phone "{{phone}}" is already used by "{{name}}".

LOGIN.TITLE: Welcome back
LOGIN.TOKEN_ERROR: Token authentication failed. Please login with your username and password.

FORGOT_PASSWORD.TITLE: Forgot Your Password
FORGOT_PASSWORD.DESCRIPTION: Enter your email address below and we'll send your password reset instructions by email.
FORGOT_PASSWORD.SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: If an account exists with the username {{username}}, you will receive a password reset email shortly. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Welcome
RESET_PASSWORD.DESCRIPTION: Please update your account details and enter a new password for your account.

VALIDATION.MOBILE_PATTERN: Mobile number must contain only numbers

CONTEXT_SELECTION.NO_PERMISSION_DESCRIPTION: Your account does not have permission to list clients. Please contact your administrator for access.
CONTEXT_SELECTION.ERROR_SELECT_ACCOUNT: Failed to select account. Please try again.
CONTEXT_SELECTION.ERROR_UNABLE_TO_PROCEED: Unable to proceed. Please contact support.

REPORTS_LIST.EMPTY_HINT: Reports will appear here once generated

CONFLICT_MODAL.TITLE: This report changed elsewhere
CONFLICT_MODAL.MESSAGE: Your edits couldn't be saved because this report was updated in another session (for example, another open tab). Choose how to resolve it.

SHARED.EVENT_THRESHOLD_HELP: Leave blank to show all events. A value shows only events greater than it.

STOPPING.TITLE: Stopping Filter
STOPPING.HELP_TEXT: Leave duration blank to show all stops. A value shows only stops longer than it.

UTILIZATION.TITLE: Utilization
UTILIZATION.HELP_TEXT: Working Hours uses each asset's configured schedule. Leave Target blank to omit the Target and Distance Utilization % columns.

ARIA.ASK_AI_TITLE: Ask the AI to change this block

EDIT_POPOVER.PLACEHOLDER: Describe the change… e.g. make it event count per vehicle
